name: AlleyNote Dev Environment (Trixie)
postCreateCommand: SUDO='' && if command -v sudo >/dev/null 2>&1; then SUDO='sudo'; elif [ "$(id -u)" -ne 0 ]; then echo 'Error: sudo not found and current user is not root.'; exit 1; fi && $SUDO apt-get update && $SUDO apt-get install -y ripgrep lsof iproute2 jq fd-find bat tree fzf htop ncdu && $SUDO ln -sf /usr/bin/fdfind /usr/local/bin/fd && (command -v batcat >/dev/null && $SUDO ln -sf /usr/bin/batcat /usr/local/bin/bat || true) && npm install && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
postAttachCommand: echo 'Frontend: http://localhost:3000' && echo 'Backend API (DevContainer local): http://localhost:8081' && echo 'Backend API (Production / override): http://localhost:8080' && echo 'API Docs UI (DevContainer local): http://localhost:8081/api/docs/ui' && echo 'API Docs UI (Production / override): http://localhost:8080/api/docs/ui'
